title: elaeocarpus chrysophyllus
intro: Elaeocarpus chrysophyllus, also known as the Fraser's magnolia or the forestiera, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus chrysophyllus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various infections. Elaeocarpus chrysophyllus is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
